results.rendered_html:
saṃdhukṣ 1 A. To be kindled or excited (fig also); saṃdudhukṣe tayoḥ kopaḥ  Bk. 14. 109. 
— Caus. To kindle, inflame, excite; nirvāṇabhūyiṣṭhamathāsya vīryaṃ saṃdhukṣayaṃtīva vapurguṇena  Ku. 3. 52 ; ātapāṃtasaṃdhukṣitamadā  V. 4.
